name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to use this bot:

1. Tap ⚙️ Setup to connect your channel and add your schedule
2. Reminders are posted automatically at scheduled times
3. Tap 📅 Update schedule to change your reminders
4. Tap 📊 Status to see logs and configuration

Need help? Tap /start to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
